title: SPECTRAL QUADRUPLES
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: A set of data is supposed to give possible axioms for space–times. It is hoped that such a proposal can serve to become a testing ground on the way to a general formulation. At the moment, the axioms are known to be sufficient for cases with a sufficient number of symmetries, in particular for 1+1 de Sitter space–time.
